purpose: read-only active Steam JP residual audit; no game installation, release, or GitHub write

safe_application_route.basis: active Steam JP file hash in validation.active_steam.v1.json
safe_application_route.gate: each source_jp_utf16le_sha256 must equal the staged JP text before rebuild
safe_application_route.write_target: staging candidate only; never the Steam installation during audit
